creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 207509
svn diff to upgrade to 0.58.2

gohugo has been updated to 0.58.2
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.58.2)

Change log:
- Fix cache keys for bundled resoures in transform.Unmarshal
- filecache: Ignore "does not exist" errors in prune

- portlint: OK (looks fine.)
- testport: OK (poudriere: <11.3-RELEASE, 11.3-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.0-STABLE, and 13.0-CURRENT>, < amd64/i386 >, <manpages + with/without extended> tested)
